title: TinyCreate
description: A bridge addon for Create and Tiny Redstone. Adds tiny-redstone components for create's analog levers, nixie tubes and redstone links
body:
Adds a variety of [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) themed [TinyRedstone](https://modrinth.com/mod/tiny-redstone) tiles. Additionally, adds compatibility between TinyRedstone and Create's schematics and schematicannons.


### Known Incompatibilities:

* RedstF Create Addon - fully incompatible, crashes panels on its own, crashes entire game if Create Connected is also present
* Create Connected - possible issues. Used to crash when used together, current state - untested
* Create Dreams n' Desires - possible issues. Used to break link connectivity, current state - untested

### Overview of the added tiles:
**1. Tiny Redstone Link** - Can be configured with 2 items to set a frequency (similar to redstone links in the [Create mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/create)

![Tiny Redstone Link configuration UI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a7978d951594cc82b1972010b1ee9c9782a15e79.png)


These are intercompatible with create's links and other wireless interfaces. This means you can transmit from a Create link and recieve with a tiny link or vice versa. Crafted from a Create mod's redstone link

**2. Tiny Analog lever** - can be clicked repeatedly to increment the power level it outputs. Wraps around to 0 after 15. Crafted from a Create mod's Analog Lever

**3. Tiny Eight Segment** - displays the power level its supplied with. Crafted from a Create mod's Nixie Tube

![A Tiny Analog Lever outputting a value, and a Tiny Eight Segment displaying it](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dfd992d92c860c033ab7b959c2258f70f286911d_0.webp)

 
**4\. Tiny Pulse Extender** - A tiny version of the Pulse Extender from Create. Turns on without a delay, turns off with a configurable delay. Output can be inverted.

**5\. Tiny Pulse Timer** - A tiny version of the Pulse Timer from Create. Outputs pulses repeatedly with a configurable duration and interval. Output can be inverted.

**6\. Tiny Inductor** - A tiny version of the Redstone Inductor from Create Aeronautics. Output value will gradually change to match the input value. The speed of change can be configured. Output can be inverted

**7\. Tiny Accumulator** - A tiny version of the Redstone Accumulator from Create Aeronautics. Inputs from the back increase the output value, inputs from the side decrease it. A cooldown/speed can be configured. Output can be inverted

***

[Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) and [TinyRedstone](https://modrinth.com/mod/tiny-redstone) are required. [Create Aeronautics](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-aeronautics) is not required, but will change the recipes of aeronautics-based items

[Mod showcase](https://youtube.com/watch?v=i-hPyDJyhpk)
